overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a scenic mountain valley with a river, crossing a tribal-decorated wooden bridge, and approaching ancient ruins in the distance. The clip features high-fidelity open-world exploration with dynamic lighting and detailed natural environments.

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the dirt path beside a river, heading toward snow-capped mountains in the distance

entered.detail: large mountain peak with snow visible on upper slopes dominating the background
flowing water running parallel to the trail on the left side
tall evergreen trees scattered across the valley slopes
worn earthy path with patches of grass and rocks
clusters of yellow flowers growing alongside the trail
bushes with distinctive red leaves lining the path
massive boulder formation on the right side of the trail
tall carved wooden post with tribal decorations near the river

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wide-open riverside trail surrounded by moderate vegetation including pine trees and colorful wildflowers. The snow-capped mountain dominates the distant view while the river flows calmly on the left. The path is clear with no other agents present.

events.description: character steps onto the decorated wooden bridge crossing the river

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge with decorated pillars, moving from left side of river to right side

entered.detail: narrow bridge made of wooden planks with woven rope patterns on the surface
carved wooden posts with blue rope bindings and decorative patterns
thick blue ropes strung between posts serving as bridge railings
weathered wooden boards showing signs of age and use
wooden pillars covered in climbing vines and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a narrow wooden bridge decorated with tribal carvings and blue rope bindings. The bridge spans the river which now flows on the right side below. The enclosed structure of the bridge creates a more confined spatial layout compared to the open trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley approach to ancient ruins

events.description: character exits the bridge onto rocky terrain with ancient ruins becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: running through rocky terrain toward distant ancient ruins, navigating around boulders and dead trees

entered.detail: uneven path covered with stones and gravel leading toward the ruins
large crumbling structures and metallic debris scattered in the valley ahead
leafless tree trunks and branches indicating a more desolate area
cluster of large rocks and stone formations
steep rock face forming the valley wall
loose stones and pebbles along the path edges

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the character enters a rockier valley landscape with sparse vegetation and dead trees. Ancient ruins become visible in the distance ahead, suggesting an approaching point of interest. The terrain shifts to a more arid, boulder-strewn environment as the character continues exploring toward the mysterious structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush riverside valley that gradually transitions into a rugged, arid landscape of ancient ruins. It begins with the character running along a wide-open trail flanked by pine trees and colorful wildflowers, with a calm river flowing to the left beneath a dominant snow-capped mountain. As the path leads forward, the scene shifts into a more confined space as the character crosses a narrow wooden bridge adorned with tribal carvings and blue rope bindings. Once across, the environment opens back up but transforms into a rockier valley characterized by sparse vegetation and dead trees. The camera finally pushes forward across boulder-strewn terrain as mysterious ancient ruins emerge in the distance.
